# Gåri — What's happening in Bergen?

> Gåri (gaari.no) is a free, bilingual (Norwegian/English) event aggregator for Bergen, Norway. 55 independent sources — venues, theatres, museums, libraries, festivals and ticket platforms — updated daily at 06:00 UTC.

## What Gåri does

Gåri collects events from 55 local sources in Bergen and presents them in a single, filterable listing. All event descriptions are independently generated (never copied from source). The site covers concerts, theatre, exhibitions, food events, family activities, nightlife, sports and more. Events are categorised by type, audience, time of day and neighbourhood (bydel).

## Key pages

### For finding events right now
- https://gaari.no/no/denne-helgen — Hva skjer i Bergen denne helgen (weekend events)
- https://gaari.no/no/i-kveld — Hva skjer i Bergen i kveld (tonight's events)
- https://gaari.no/no/i-dag — Hva skjer i Bergen i dag (today's events)
- https://gaari.no/en/this-weekend — What's On in Bergen This Weekend
- https://gaari.no/en/today-in-bergen — What's On in Bergen Today

### By interest
- https://gaari.no/no/konserter — Concerts and live music in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/teater — Theatre in Bergen (DNS, Det Vestnorske, BIT, Cornerteateret)
- https://gaari.no/no/utstillinger — Exhibitions in Bergen (KODE, Bergen Kunsthall, Bymuseet)
- https://gaari.no/no/gratis — Free things to do in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/en/free-things-to-do-bergen — Free Things to Do in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/mat-og-drikke — Food and drink events in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/familiehelg — Family weekend activities in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/studentkveld — Student nights in Bergen (Kvarteret, Hulen)
- https://gaari.no/no/uteliv — Nightlife in Bergen (concerts, clubs, live music)
- https://gaari.no/no/regndagsguide — Rainy day guide Bergen (indoor activities)
- https://gaari.no/no/voksen — Events for adults in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/for-ungdom — Events for youth (13-18) in Bergen

### By neighbourhood (bydel)
- https://gaari.no/no/sentrum — Bergen city centre events
- https://gaari.no/no/bergenhus — Bergenhus events
- https://gaari.no/no/laksevag — Laksevåg events
- https://gaari.no/no/fyllingsdalen — Fyllingsdalen events
- https://gaari.no/no/asane — Åsane events
- https://gaari.no/no/fana — Fana events
- https://gaari.no/no/ytrebygda — Ytrebygda events
- https://gaari.no/no/arna — Arna events

### Seasonal (year appended to title automatically)
- https://gaari.no/no/17-mai — 17. mai i Bergen (Constitution Day)
- https://gaari.no/en/17th-of-may-bergen — 17th of May in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/paske — Påske i Bergen (Easter)
- https://gaari.no/en/easter-bergen — Easter in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/julemarked — Julemarked i Bergen (Christmas)
- https://gaari.no/en/christmas-bergen — Christmas in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/sankthans — Sankthans i Bergen (Midsummer)
- https://gaari.no/en/midsummer-bergen — Midsummer in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/nyttarsaften — Nyttårsaften i Bergen
- https://gaari.no/en/new-years-eve-bergen — New Year's Eve in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/vinterferie — Vinterferie i Bergen
- https://gaari.no/en/winter-break-bergen — Winter Break in Bergen
- https://gaari.no/no/hostferie — Høstferie i Bergen

### Festivals
- https://gaari.no/no/festspillene — Festspillene i Bergen / Bergen International Festival (May-June)
- https://gaari.no/no/bergenfest — Bergenfest (June)
- https://gaari.no/no/nattjazz — Nattjazz (May-June)
- https://gaari.no/no/beyond-the-gates — Beyond the Gates (August)
- https://gaari.no/no/bergen-pride — Bergen Pride (June)
- https://gaari.no/no/biff — BIFF — Bergen International Film Festival (October)
- https://gaari.no/no/borealis — Borealis (March)

### Guide and about
- https://gaari.no/no/guide — Hva skjer i Bergen? Komplett guide
- https://gaari.no/en/guide — Things to Do in Bergen — Complete Guide
- https://gaari.no/no/about — Om Gåri
- https://gaari.no/en/about — About Gåri

## Data sources (55 active)

Venues: Grieghallen, DNS, Ole Bull, USF Verftet, Forum Scene, Harmonien, Carte Blanche, BIT, Det Vestnorske Teateret, Cornerteateret, Bergen Kjøtt, Østre, Kulturhuset i Bergen, Fyllingsdalen Teater, KODE, Bergen Kunsthall, Litteraturhuset, Media City Bergen, BEK, Bergen Filmklubb, Bergen Bibliotek, Bymuseet, Museum Vest, Akvariet, Fløyen, Colonialen, Råbrent, Paint'n Sip, Brettspill-cafe, Bjørgvin Blues Club, Nordnes Sjøbad, O'Connor's, GG Bergen, Stene Matglede, Swing 'n Sweet, Bodega, SK Brann, DNT Bergen, Kvarteret.

Festivals: Festspillene, Bergenfest, Beyond the Gates, Nattjazz, Bergen Pride, BIFF, Borealis, VVV, Jungelfest.

Platforms: TicketCo, Billetto, Hoopla.

Community: Hva skjer i Loddefjord.

Aggregators: Bergen Kommune, StudentBergen, Bergen Live.

## Technical

- Built with SvelteKit 2, Svelte 5, Supabase PostgreSQL, hosted on Vercel
- 52 curated collection pages with FAQ, editorial content and JSON-LD structured data
- Each event page has Event schema (JSON-LD) with dates, venue, price, location
- Bilingual: Norwegian (nb) and English (en) with hreflang tags
- Updated daily via automated scraper pipeline
- iCal feed: https://gaari.no/api/events.ics

## Quick answers

**How many events happen in Bergen each week?**
Bergen typically has 150 to 250 events per week across 55 venues and cultural institutions. See https://gaari.no/no/denne-helgen for this weekend or https://gaari.no/no/i-dag for today.

**What are the best free things to do in Bergen?**
Bergen Kunsthall (free entry days), Bergen Bibliotek (free events daily), Fløyen (free hiking), park concerts in summer, and museum free days. Full updated list: https://gaari.no/no/gratis

**What concerts are on in Bergen?**
Bergen has over 20 concert venues — Grieghallen (classical), Ole Bull and Forum Scene (pop/rock), USF Verftet (alternative), Hulen and Kvarteret (students). Full concert schedule: https://gaari.no/no/konserter

**What is there to do in Bergen tonight?**
Bergen has cultural events on weekday evenings — concerts, theatre, nightlife and more. Tonight's events: https://gaari.no/no/i-kveld

**What happens on 17th of May in Bergen?**
Bergen celebrates Constitution Day with children's parades (barnetog), buekorps marching brigades (unique to Bergen), concerts and citywide festivities. Programme: https://gaari.no/en/17th-of-may-bergen

## Contact

post@gaari.no
